descript.abstract: This feature class depicts area boundaries of Wild Horse and Burro Territories to correspond to tabular data in the RIMS (Rangeland Information Management System).
descript.purpose: The Wild Horse and Burro Territories feature class designates boundaries to establish extent of distribution and management of Wild Horse and Burro territories. This is a published layer created by combining GIS data managed by each National Forest and attribute data stored in the Forest Service RIMS database application. This dataset is designed for reporting and analysis and is not used to enter or edit data. The data will be used to create field working maps and any other logical uses that the internal and external public may determine this information is helpful for.

idinfo.useconst: The USDA Forest Service makes no warranty, expressed or implied, including the warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose, nor assumes any legal liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness or utility of these geospatial data, or for the improper or incorrect use of these geospatial data. These geospatial data and related maps or graphics are not legal documents and are not intended to be used as such. The data and maps may not be used to determine title, ownership, legal descriptions or boundaries, legal jurisdiction, or restrictions that may be in place on either public or private land. Natural hazards may or may not be depicted on the data and maps, and users should exercise due caution. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible to verify the limitations of the geospatial data and to use the data accordingly.

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

dataqual.logic: Data stewards have been relied on to validate the data quality and accuracy of the boundaries for Wild Horse and Burro Territories. Territory boundaries have been identified using various methods through the years like GPS or digitizing. Spatial data comes from the district and is consolidated at the forest level. This will be a consolidated national extent of the data entered at the lowest level of the agency. Data quality is dependent on quality data maintenance by local data stewards.
dataqual.complete: This data is current only as of the date of publication and may change daily. The need for a daily refresh is key to incorporate any and all local changes as they are made and keep the data in EDW fresh.

horizpa.horizpar: Positional accuracy is verified by visual comparison to source datasets.

enttyp.enttypd: Feature class: A collection of geographic features with the same geometry type (such as point, line, or polygon), the same attributes, and the same spatial reference.

attr.attrdef: Internal feature number.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: The numeric code, six digits, for the Admin Organizational unit (RRFFDD where R = Region code number, F = Forest code number, and D = District code number). The administrative organization is the Ranger District on which the allotment is located.
The name associated with the Admin Organization identified.

The numeric code for the Managing Organizational unit (RRFFDD where R = Region code number, F = Forest code number, and D = District code number). The managing organization is the Ranger District that manages the allotment, regardless of the location of the allotment.
The name associated with the Managing Organization identified.
Globally unique identifier across all Forest Service databases, foreign key to most Forest Service National Application databases. Specifically for Wild Horse and Burro Territories.
A 5 character alpha numeric identifier assigned to the Wild Horse and Burro Territory.
The name of the wild horse and burro designated territory. The name need not be unique.
The operating status of the Wild Horse and Burro Territory.

edom.edomvd: An active Wild Horse and Burro Territory is one where there is a current population.
An inactive Wild Horse and Burro Territory is one where there is not a current population.

attr.attrdef: Indicates wild horse for the Wild Horse and Burro Territory. Format is YES/NO.

edom.edomvd: Wild Horses may be present on this territory.
Wild Horses are not present on this territory.

attr.attrdef: Indicates wild burro for the Wild Horse and Burro Territory. Format is YES/NO.

edom.edomvd: Wild Burros may be present on this territory.
Wild Burros are not present on this territory.

attr.attrdef: Indicates if the Appropriate Management Level for Wild Horses has been determined or not.

edom.edomvd: The Appropriate Management Level (AML) has not been determined for this territory.
The Appropriate Management Level (AML) has been determined for this territory.

attr.attrdef: Value represents the minimum appropriate management level of wild horses on the territory.
Value represents the minimum appropriate management level of wild horses on the territory.
Indicates if the Appropriate Management Level for Wild Burro has been determined or not.

edom.edomvd: The Appropriate Management Level (AML) has not been determined for this territory.
The Appropriate Management Level (AML) has been determined for this territory.

attr.attrdef: Value represents the minimum appropriate management level of wild burros on the territory.
Value represents the minimum appropriate management level of wild burros on the territory.
Indicates if the territory is within a Joint Management Area.

edom.edomvd: The territory is managed within a Joint Management Area.
The territory is not managed within a Joint Management Area.

attr.attrdef: The number of national forest service acres within the Wild Horse and Burro Territory.

attrdomv.udom: The number of national forest service acres within the Wild Horse and Burro Territory.

attr.attrdef: The number of acres within the Wild Horse and Burro Territory that are under other ownership and managed as part of the herd area or herd management area.

attrdomv.udom: The number of acres within the Wild Horse and Burro Territory that are under other ownership and managed as part of the herd area or herd management area.

attr.attrdef: The number of acres within the Wild Horse and Burro Territory regardless of land ownership.

attrdomv.udom: The number of acres within the Wild Horse and Burro Territory that are under other ownership and managed as part of the herd area or herd management area.

attr.attrdef: The fiscal year that most recent NEPA Decision was approved. Format is YYYY.

attrdomv.udom: The fiscal year that most recent NEPA Decision was approved. Format is YYYY.

attr.attrdef: The fiscal year that most recent Territory Management Plan was approved. Format is YYYY.

attrdomv.udom: The fiscal year that most recent Territory Management Plan was approved. Format is YYYY.

attr.attrdef: Revision date, the date and time when the feature was created or last updated. Time is entered using a 24-hour clock (military time) based on the Pacific Standard Time (PST) zone. Tasks associated with each revision should be documented in the process steps of theme-based metadata. Entering the date only is acceptable.

The Data Source codes provide information on how GIS point, line and polygon features, in Forest Service geospatial datasets, have been derived. Each Data Source code description contains information on the data used to derive features. Code descriptions are based upon the data source and positional accuracy associated with those figures.
Accuracy is the calculated positional accuracy of map features compared to true ground position based on the FGDC NSSDA (National Standard for Spatial Data Accuracy (FGDC-STD-007.3-1998)

attrdomv.udom: Distance (+/-) in meters, of expected difference between feature and real world object locations.

attr.attrdef: Esri field of boundary area in coordinate system units

attrdomv.udom: Esri field of boundary length in coordinate system units

attr.attrdef: Feature geometry.
A type of UUID (Universal Unique Identifier) in which values are automatically assigned by the geodatabase when a row is created.

attrdomv.udom: A type of UUID (Universal Unique Identifier) in which values are automatically assigned by the geodatabase when a row is created.

attr.attrdef: Esri field of boundary length in coordinate system units

attrdomv.udom: Esri field of boundary length in coordinate system units

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
